task_description: Build a comprehensive marriage matching module in HTML/CSS/JS that analyzes horoscopes of both boy and girl using BPHS and KP astrology. Includes house signification analysis, marriage timeline prediction via Vimshottari Dasha, 20-year relationship strength/weakness forecast considering Dasha and transits, health compatibility screening, Ashtakoota (8 koota) matching, Dashakoota (10 koota) matching, a built-in Technical Manual, and PDF report generation.
